top_signals.title: Wall Street banks post blockbuster profits as equities trading booms
top_signals.summary: JPMorgan, Goldman, Citi and BofA kick off earnings season with strong results
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Consumers turn to buy now, pay later for essential expenses — with growing risks
top_signals.summary: Some consumers are using buy now, pay later for essential expenses like groceries, rent and utility bills. But more BNPL users have recently had a late payment.
